name: Scareclaw Defanging
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>界放せし肆世壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スケアクロー・ディファング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot target "Scareclaw" Link Monsters or "Visas Starfrost" you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Banish any monster destroyed by battle with a "Scareclaw" Link Monster or "Visas Starfrost" you control. You can banish 1 "Scareclaw" Link Monster from your field or GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Scareclaw Defanging" once per turn.
eff: Your opponent cannot target "Scareclaw" Link Monsters or "Visas Starfrost" you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Banish any monster destroyed by battle with a "Scareclaw" Link Monster or "Visas Starfrost" you control. You can banish 1 "Scareclaw" Link Monster from your field or GY, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Scareclaw Defanging" once per turn.

mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
